channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to watch NASA’s Artemis II splash back down to Earth
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission has traveled farther from Earth than any mission before. Here's how to watch the crew's return landing in the Pacific Ocean.

item.title: Before ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ Blew Up, Disney Scrapped a Pixar Movie With a Similar Vibe
item.description: 'Be Fri' was about two girls whose friendship was tested when they realized their favorite anime was real.

item.title: ‘Doomsday’ Asteroids Could Have Kickstarted Life on Our Planet
item.description: New research contends that a cataclysmic meteor impact could create new life, as easily as it could destroy.

item.title: 'Shockingly good value': New rugged Android tablet has a built-in 1080p projector, night-vision camera, and only costs $599
item.description: The 8849 TANK Pad Ultra is a rugged Android tablet that combines a projector, night vision camera, massive battery, and advanced connectivity.

item.title: A man allegedly threw a Molotov cocktail at Sam Altman's house
item.description: A 20-year-old man was arrested by the San Francisco Police Department after allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's house, The New York Times reports.In a statement shared on X, SFPD wrote that it responded to a request for a fire investigation in the North Beach neighborhood of San Francisco around 7:12 AM ET / 4:12AM PT. "At the scene, officers learned that an unknown male subject threw an incendiary destructive device at a home, causing a fire at an exterior gate." After the man fled on foot, police found and arrested him around an hour later while responding to a b...

item.title: Now the FAA says gamers are the answer to its air traffic controller shortage
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) has struggled for years to have enough air traffic controllers to address shortages, with the US Government Accountability Office (GAO) saying in January that the number of people in the job in the US has declined by around 6 percent "in the last decade." Now the Trump administration is rolling […]

item.title: Phoebe Gates and the contentious debate over fair pay for influencers
item.description: Early-stage AI startups often operate on a budget, even when they’re cofounded by the daughter of famous billionaires. Frugal founders are often praised for trying to stay within budget. But when the founder happens to be the daughter of one of the world’s richest people, the expectations seem to be different.

item.title: Où et quand regarder le retour d’Artemis II sur Terre ? YouTube, NASA+, Netflix, Prime Video et plus encore
item.description: Ce soir, la mission Artemis II va se terminer. Voici les horaires précis pour la France métropolitaine.

item.title: Why moon joy feels so good right now
item.description: Moon joy, a phrase from NASA's communications with Artemis II astronauts on their lunar mission, is shared across social media.

item.title: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw’s creator from accessing Claude
item.description: This ban took place after Claude's pricing changed for OpenClaw users last week.

item.title: 20-year-old man arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at Sam Altman’s house
item.description: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old man suspected of throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's Russian Hill house early Friday morning, The San Francisco Standard reports. The incident was caught on surveillance cameras shortly before 7AM ET. Later that morning, someone matching the suspect's description was seen making threats outside OpenAI's […]...

item.title: What on Earth Is Happening With ‘Doctor Who’?
item.description: The clock's ticking on the return of 'Doctor Who' later this year—but seemingly all is quiet in the TARDIS.

item.title: France to Ditch Microsoft Windows as Europe’s War on American Tech Rages On
How to watch the Artemis II astronauts return to Earth
item.description: The Orion capsule, carrying Artemis II commander Reid Wiseman, pilot Victor Glover, mission specialist Christina Koch, and Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen, is expected to land back to Earth after a nine-day mission that set a record for the farthest distance humans have ever traveled from our planet. After making a high-speed re-entry through the atmosphere, […]...

item.title: I created my dream coffee corner at IKEA for under $100 — and my mornings are about to get a lot cozier
item.description: Making a dedicated space for your morning will make preparing coffee more relaxing, and help get your day off to the right start.

item.title: Estonia is the rare EU country opposing child social media bans
item.description: As child social media bans spread across Europe and beyond, Estonia isn't having it. On Friday, the country's education minister said the bans won't "actually solve problems," while warning that the kids will find a way regardless.Although companies like Meta would love for you to believe it’s a fairy tale, social media addiction is associated with tangible negative repercussions for children. Studies show that its harms range from depression and anxiety to sleep deprivation and obesity. (The latter is from all the targeted junk food advertising.) On the other hand, teens can find community an...

item.title: 'Experts' to rent for $1 per month: Hostinger debuts 7-person AI team to help SMBs save thousands on consultant fees
item.description: Hostinger Agents provides small businesses with seven AI-driven specialists covering strategy, marketing, sales, legal, and content for practical, affordable support.

item.title: Melania Trump’s surprise statement about Epstein majorly backfired: Ghislaine Maxwell emails in spotlight
item.description: If the first lady wanted people not to Google her and Jeffrey Epstein, she’s failing miserably. If Melania Trump wanted people not to put her and Jeffery Epstein’s names in the same sentence, she’s failing miserably.
